title: Source Reference
description: Common v1 reference to a Source-of-Truth, runtime source, or evidence source.
$comment: Source: MASTER-01 Source-of-Truth Registry requires source_id, source_name, source_type, owner, decision_authority, access method, evidence rule, and fallback rule for registered sources.

sourceType.description: Source type derived from MASTER-01 source classification.

ownerCore.description: Owner Core that has authority over the source.
